children.name:
AssertionError: assert "Peer node couldn't find any messages" in '500 Server Error: Internal Server Error for url: http://127.0.0.1:11058/relay/v1/messages/%2Fwaku%2F2%2Frs%2F18%2F1'
 +  where '500 Server Error: Internal Server Error for url: http://127.0.0.1:11058/relay/v1/messages/%2Fwaku%2F2%2Frs%2F18%2F1' = str(HTTPError('500 Server Error: Internal Server Error for url: http://127.0.0.1:11058/relay/v1/messages/%2Fwaku%2F2%2Frs%2F18%2F1'))

AssertionError: Payloads failed: ['A simple string', 'An integer', 'A dictionary', 'Chinese characters', 'Emojis', 'Lorem ipsum text']
assert not ['A simple string', 'An integer', 'A dictionary', 'Chinese characters', 'Emojis', 'Lorem ipsum text']

AssertionError: ContentTopics failed: [{'description': 'A simple string', 'value': 'Hello World!'}, {'description': 'An integer', 'value': '1234567890'}]
assert not [{'description': 'A simple string', 'value': 'Hello World!'}, {'description': 'An integer', 'value': '1234567890'}]

AssertionError: Timestamps failed: [{'description': 'Now', 'value': 1700236740993217280, 'valid_for': ['nwaku', 'gowaku']}, {'description': 'Far future', 'value': 2015596740993195008, 'valid_for': ['nwaku', 'gowaku']}, {'description': 'Recent past', 'value': 1700233140993195008, 'valid_for': ['nwaku', 'gowaku']}, {'description': 'Near future', 'value': 1700240340993195008, 'valid_for': ['nwaku', 'gowaku']}, {'description': 'Positive number', 'value': 1, 'valid_for': ['nwaku', 'gowaku']}, {'description': 'Negative number', 'value': -1, 'valid_for': ['nwaku', 'gowaku']}]
assert not [{'description': 'Now', 'valid_for': ['nwaku', 'gowaku'], 'value': 1700236740993217280}, {'description': 'Far future', 'valid_for': ['nwaku', 'gowaku'], 'value': 2015596740993195008}, {'description': 'Recent past', 'valid_for': ['nwaku', 'gowaku'], 'value': 1700233140993195008}, {'description': 'Near future', 'valid_for': ['nwaku', 'gowaku'], 'value': 1700240340993195008}, {'description': 'Positive number', 'valid_for': ['nwaku', 'gowaku'], 'value': 1}, {'description': 'Negative number', 'valid_for': ['nwaku', 'gowaku'], 'value': -1}]

AssertionError: Ephemeral that failed: [True, False]
assert not [True, False]
